evidence: Baseline hidden exposure is 3.77 million people and 404.77 km2 built-up; stress surface spans 1.33-5.36 million people and 140.44-523.64 km2 built-up.
claim_supported: Hidden exposure persists across deformation/observability threshold choices.
residual_boundary: Sensitivity surface, not a formal uncertainty interval.

evidence: Native-pixel sensitivity gives 3.63 million people and 404.77 km2 built-up versus 3.77 million and 404.77 km2 in the area-weighted baseline.
claim_supported: Headline result is not created by assigning all exposure to one reporting cell representation.
residual_boundary: Native-pixel exposure allocation is not independent deformation truth.

evidence: Block sizes 3/5/10/20 cells and shifted origins keep strong hidden population fraction at 0.182735 and built-up fraction at 0.337248.
claim_supported: Reported exposure fractions are not a product of one arbitrary block partition.
residual_boundary: Does not rerun all native rasters under shifted grids.

defensive_experiment: Placebo randomization of strong labels and hidden masks
evidence: 5000-iteration placebo shows strong-not-majority OR 5.78 versus global-null mean 1.01 and spatial-null mean 3.38; random hidden-mask models produce larger exposure totals than observed.
claim_supported: Strong deformation overlaps the hidden class more than expected, while hidden exposure is not just the most exposed random mask.
residual_boundary: Placebo is falsification, not independent deformation validation.

defensive_experiment: Visible-only vs observability-aware priority list comparison
evidence: At a 500-cell budget, observability-aware ranking adds 41009.8 hidden people and 0.640 km2 hidden built-up in aware-only cells.
claim_supported: The audit can change decision-facing inspection priorities, not only summary accounting.
residual_boundary: Cell-count budget comparison, not cost-benefit or damage modelling.

evidence: Rhine has OR 0.810149 and is retained as a control/specification case rather than a positive transfer case.
claim_supported: The workflow does not force every region to produce a positive observability-bias signal.
residual_boundary: Rhine is a proxy-level control, not a dense independent truth product.

evidence: Po OR 1.32894 (bootstrap 1.129-1.557), Chao Phraya legacy OR 3.56187, Brantas OR 1.59171; Rhine remains inconclusive.
claim_supported: The signal is reported with land-cover context rather than being attributed mechanically to subsidence alone.
residual_boundary: Land-cover adjustment is a control layer, not a causal mechanism model.

defensive_experiment: DWR/TRE positive control and Cyprus EGMS boundary control
evidence: Central Valley DWR/TRE strong pixels contain 102164 people and 18.81 km2 built-up; Cyprus EGMS near-zero tile has 65 strong points and 0.31% population share at 5 mm/yr.
claim_supported: External controls show the overlay behaves in strong and near-zero settings.
residual_boundary: Does not replace missing Po/Rhone dense EGMS strong-subsidence closure.
